code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = 0
  mut i = 0

  while i < words.len()
    let word = match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      ""
    end
    let wlen = string.len(word)
    if wlen > best_len
      best = word
      best_len = wlen
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("longest=#{best}")
end
